images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑grade model, her flawless yet realistic skin showing subtle pores and faint vellus hair, expressive large eyes, a cute‑seductive face, a fit curvy silhouette with a slim waist and ample chest, long straight black silky hair catching neon reflections. She wears an oversized, soft‑cotton hoodie in pastel‑grey that slips off one shoulder, hugging her curves and revealing a glimpse of a lacey black bralette underneath, paired with high‑waist denim shorts that end just above smooth thighs and expose delicate knee‑high socks. In the background, a glimmering carousel spins in a Shibuya night street drenched with teal and orange neon, the soft bokeh of the crowd emphasizing her avant‑garde artistic mood. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, the scene uses Butterfly lighting to carve elegant shadows under her cheekbones, while depth of field, global illumination, and ray‑traced lighting give a cinematic teal‑and‑orange color grade that captures her natural, candid laugh as she glances playfully at the camera.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑style model, flawless pore‑detailed skin shimmering under a soft moonlight glow, her straight black silky hair swept into an elegant high bun. She is dressed in a Korean preppy ensemble: a fitted ivory blouse with delicate lace trim, a high‑waisted micro‑pleated charcoal skirt, sheer black thigh‑high socks and sleek ballet‑inspired flats that elongate her dancer’s calves. The scene unfolds on a dramatic cliff edge, the sea and distant city lights blurred into a velvety bokeh, the night sky lit by a luminous moon that bathes her in bright, clear illumination without heavy shadows. She strikes a subtle ballet pose, one leg extended, a gentle soft smile on her lips, eyes gazing directly at the camera as if sharing a secret. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, the image features perfect depth of field, ray‑traced reflections on her skin, and global illumination that captures the moon‑lit sheen of her outfit.8k photo, Large breasts
